testcase.name: test_legacy_uploads_path_still_works

failure.message: assert False + where False = <built-in method startswith of str object at 0xfdaa175f5cf0>('image/') + where <built-in method startswith of str object at 0xfdaa175f5cf0> = 'text/html; charset=utf-8'.startswith + where 'text/html; charset=utf-8' = get('content-type', '') + where get = {'Date': 'Thu, 18 Jun 2026 09:10:04 GMT', 'Content-Type': 'text/html; charset=utf-8', 'Transfer-Encoding': 'chunked', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'CF-Ray': 'a0d928a6ec2fe260-ORD', 'CF-Cache-Status': 'DYNAMIC', 'set-cookie': '__cf_bm=ZHMkl._izDjH0HIq1QP88OmmKFYqTqJfYAKqfg_1eMk-1781773804.628105-1.0.1.1-AmyKQwREE0Qx.SFUqCmwDszfqkf5b3KoS9jm0EzLXWlZDWZqc2V_mep8XsMEHKbmWHyNceFIHgkYedLqjgb7y1j7kEEypvIUzIvaG9iIuHs8wcAdV4yRTMKXi6z93ogN; testcase.name: test_social_post_png_3000x3000

failure.message:
AssertionError: expected 3000x3000, got (1500, 1500) assert (1500, 1500) == (3000, 3000)
At index 0 diff: 1500 != 3000
Full diff: ( - 3000, ? ^^...
...Full output truncated (7 lines hidden), use '-vv' to show

testcase.failure:
E AssertionError: expected 3000x3000, got (1500, 1500) assert (1500, 1500) == (3000, 3000)
At index 0 diff: 1500 != 3000
Full diff: ( - 3000, ? ^^...
...Full output truncated (7 lines hidden), use '-vv' to show
